title: MDR-TB Drug Discovery AI Pipeline with Claude Agent
description: End-to-end AI-powered drug discovery pipeline for MDR-TB and any disease. Includes a Claude-orchestrated agent with 12 real-data tools (ChEMBL, PubChem, PDB, EuropePMC, RDKit ADMET/QSAR), guardrails against fabricated data, MCP server for Claude Desktop integration, and LBVS-based compound ranking. Companion to peer-reviewed manuscript submitted to Tuberculosis (Elsevier).

resources.description: Peer-reviewed manuscript draft — InhA LBVS study
ChEMBL InhA bioactivity + ADMET + composite ranking results
